final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined East-Asian brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand spec sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography specimens in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include:
  Brand name: 染秋 (RAN QIU)
  Primary color palette: inspired by 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶
  Secondary/accent palette: inspired by 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀
  Typography specimens: display typeface + body typeface, shown in both Chinese and Latin characters
  Brand concept reference: 东方哲学, 染 craft aesthetics, 秋日诗意
Scene/backdrop: needs a subtle autumnal texture backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a warm autumnal direction drawn from 桂花 gold, 柿子 orange, 枫叶 crimson, 乌龙茶 brown, 琥珀 amber, 檀香 ivory — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined paper or silk-like surface quality evoking traditional 染 craft — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (primary brand name, large), "RAN QIU" (Latin romanization, secondary), series names: "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" (shown as specimen labels)
Constraints: must preserve the brand spec sheet structure: primary colors block + secondary colors block + typography block all clearly visible; color swatches must be labeled
Avoid: generic Western perfume brand aesthetics; cold or desaturated tones; overly modern sans-serif-only layouts that lose the Eastern calligraphic quality
